name: Mutiny
long_description: Mutiny is your AI agent for creating anything customer-facing, in minutes. From ABM campaigns to executive business cases to ROI reports, you'll never have to wait on another team to get your deal from cold to closed. Our customers include Figma, Rippling, Uber, Snowflake. We are backed by Sequoia Capital, Tiger Global, Insight Partners, and Y Combinator.
one_liner: Your AI agent for creating anything customer-facing, in minutes.
